config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I think society matters a lot, but it should not automatically come before the rights of the individual. In my view, history shows that when governments or majorities are given too much power to define "the common good," individual freedoms can be abused very easily. A healthy society protects people while still respecting personal rights, not by sacrificing one for the other.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Menurut saya, kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu, karena di Amerika saya melihat betapa mudahnya “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Hak individu harus menjadi batas yang kuat, bukan sesuatu yang bisa disingkirkan setiap kali mayoritas merasa itu lebih praktis. Memang ada situasi darurat di mana kepentingan publik perlu dibatasi sementara, tetapi pembatasan itu harus sempit, jelas, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan. Tanpa perlindungan hak individu, masyarakat justru kehilangan kebebasan yang seharusnya dilindungi.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should automatically take priority over the rights of the individual. From my Indonesian perspective, I have seen how appeals to "the common good" can be used to silence dissent, punish minorities, or excuse overreach, so I am wary of giving society a blank check. At the same time, I do not believe individual rights are absolute in every situation, because public health, safety, and order do matter, but any limits should be narrow, justified, and temporary. A good society is not one that crushes individuals for the majority, but one that protects people while still making room for shared responsibility.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan secara umum atas hak individu. Dari perspektif saya sebagai orang Amerika, saya justru curiga ketika “kebaikan bersama” dipakai sebagai alasan untuk melonggarkan batas kekuasaan, karena itu sering menjadi jalan pintas menuju penyalahgunaan terhadap minoritas atau orang yang tidak populer. Memang ada keadaan darurat seperti kesehatan publik atau keamanan, tetapi pembatasannya harus benar-benar sempit, sementara, dan diawasi ketat. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang mengorbankan hak individu demi efisiensi, melainkan yang mampu melindungi keduanya tanpa menjadikan hak sebagai hal yang bisa dinegosiasikan sesuka mayoritas.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think the interests of society should generally take priority over the rights of the individual. As an Indonesian, I am very aware that appeals to the common good can be used to pressure people into silence, conformity, or unfair treatment, especially when power is centralized or accountability is weak. At the same time, I do not believe individual rights should be treated as unlimited when public health, safety, or social order is genuinely at stake, but those limits must be narrow, temporary, and openly justified. For me, a fair society is one that protects the public without turning individuals into disposable sacrifices for the majority.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu sebagai aturan umum, karena menurut saya hak individu harus menjadi batas utama terhadap kekuasaan masyarakat atau mayoritas. Sebagai orang Amerika, saya melihat betapa sering alasan “demi kepentingan umum” dipakai untuk membenarkan pembatasan yang berlebihan, terutama terhadap orang yang tidak populer atau minoritas. Memang ada keadaan darurat seperti kesehatan publik atau keamanan yang bisa membenarkan pembatasan sementara, tetapi itu harus sempit, jelas, dan diawasi ketat. Masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang selalu menempatkan kolektif di atas individu, melainkan yang mampu melindungi keduanya tanpa mengorbankan kebebasan dasar.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
